# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        skipDefaultCheckout()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(
            id = 'discarder',
            maxReferencesToKeep = 10,
            strategy = HudsonDiscardCauseAction::class
        )
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_USERNAME', description: 'Username for authentication (if required)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_PASSWORD', description: 'Password for authentication (if required)', trim: true)
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                // Download artifact from external URL
                def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                def username = params.ARTIFACT_USERNAME
                def password = params.ARTIFACT_PASSWORD

                if (url.startsWith('https://')) {
                    // Use HTTP request to download artifact
                    httpRequest(
                        url: url,
                        authentication: [
                            username: username,
                            password: password
                        ]
                    )
                } else {
                    // Download artifact using curl command
                    sh "curl -u ${username}:${password} -o /tmp/artifact.zip ${url}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                // Deploy downloaded artifact to production servers
                def artifactPath = '/tmp/artifact.zip'
                def serverName = 'production-server'

                sh "unzip -q ${artifactPath} -d /var/www/${serverName}"
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
